source: IMF WEO via DataMapper API (indicator NGDPD, nominal GDP, current USD, bn)
note: Each GVAR solve-bloc's share of the 33-bloc total nominal GDP (current USD). EA = sum of the 20 euro-area members' NGDPD. Used ONLY to form the GDP-weighted world read-out aggregate (world growth = sum_c omega_c * g_c) and to calibrate the global scenario levers; NOT part of estimation. Absent file => world read-out/levers suppressed (no fabrication).
